briefing.one_line_description: Product development and issue tracking system for software teams with AI-powered workflows

recent_signals.description: Raised $50M Series D at $650M valuation led by Sequoia Capital, Accel, General Catalyst
Raised $82M Series C at $1.25B valuation led by Accel, achieving unicorn status
Launched AI agent integration allowing Cursor to autonomously work on issues and move tasks
Expanded to 18,000+ paying customers including OpenAI, Perplexity, Cursor, Ramp, Vercel
Currently has 21 open roles representing targeted growth across product and engineering

data_gaps: LinkedIn URLs for decision makers not available
COO and Head of Product names mentioned but not provided
Conflicting funding data between Series C ($82M) and Series D ($50M) - Series D appears to be more recent
Total funding calculation unclear due to conflicting reports
Exact employee count varies between 80-100 across sources

dossier.tier_reasoning: Linear is a B2B SaaS company (25/25) in the sweet spot size range at 87 employees and Series D (25/25), but shows weak GTM maturity signals with no visible sales org or RevOps hiring (5/25), and while they have recent funding and growth signals, they appear to be product-led growth focused with no clear sales motion trigger (3/25). The company is a developer tool/project management platform, not a direct competitor to sales engagement or RevOps tooling, but their PLG motion and lack of sales infrastructure makes them a nurture candidate rather than immediate outreach priority.
icp_matches: B2B SaaS company with clear subscription model
Recent $50M Series D raise (Oct 2025) as timing trigger
Scaling to 18,000+ paying customers showing growth
icp_gaps: No visible sales organization or sales leadership roles
No SDR/AE/RevOps hiring signals in 21 open roles
Product-led growth motion with developer tool focus
No VP Sales or CRO mentioned in leadership
21 open roles are product/engineering focused, not GTM

suggested_contact.name: Karri Saarinen
suggested_contact.title: CEO & Co-Founder
suggested_contact.why_them: As CEO of a rapidly scaling PLG company hitting 18K customers, he'd be the one to decide if/when to layer in a sales motion.
